description: Gamified actor-purpose layer for JSONWisdom and Family Wisdom LIVE. People may choose, play, learn, and express roles; the system may not assign permanent identity, control people, or rank human worth.
root_rule: Actors have purposes. Purposes create quests. Quests create receipts. Receipts enable replay. Replay may earn promotion. No role creates authority over people.

actor_model.definition: An actor is a voluntary role in a learning, family, civic, or replay context.

purpose_model.definition: A purpose is a declared function, quest, or contribution path attached to an actor role.

badge_classes.earned_by: preserving an observation with consent and replay path
documenting a repair attempt without blame or coercion
shipping a useful artifact with clear boundaries and receipts
independently replaying an artifact or test vector
lowering the stack, respecting a boundary, or preserving dignity

mrs_wisdom_role.function: communication, reputation, care, consent, and human meaning layer
mrs_wisdom_role.json_purpose: machine-facing boundaries, receipts, badges, and replay paths

mr_wisdom_role.function: structured repo stack, JSON receipts, Base identity, and replay architecture
